description: How should the frontend dashboard handle pipeline progress and error states?
options: Show real-time progress updates with optimistic UI and inline error banners
Use polling with periodic refresh and modal dialogs for errors
rationale: The dashboard must communicate pipeline status clearly. Real-time updates improve UX but are more complex; polling is simpler but less responsive.

description: What component library or design system should be used for the frontend dashboard?
options: Use an existing design system (e.g., shadcn, Radix) for rapid development
Develop custom components tailored to the Sigma-1 dashboard
rationale: The dashboard is a new UI surface. Using a design system accelerates development and ensures consistency, but custom components may better fit unique requirements.
